title: Limitations of Hartree-Fock Theory
description: Understand the fundamental limitations of Hartree-Fock theory, including electron correlation, dissociation problems, and when post-HF methods are necessary.
learningObjectives: Identify the fundamental approximations in HF theory
Understand electron correlation and its effects
Recognize when HF fails (dissociation, excited states)
Know when to use post-HF methods
Appreciate the balance between accuracy and cost
